from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exact_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected = 10
    result = knapsack(capacity, items)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected optimal value {expected} for capacity {capacity} with items {items}, got {result}"
